sql: SELECT id, name, email, status, department FROM users WHERE CASE WHEN #{status} IS NOT NULL AND #{dept} IS NOT NULL THEN status = #{status} AND department = #{dept} WHEN #{status} IS NOT NULL THEN status = #{status} END AND name = #{name} AND email = #{email} ORDER BY created_at DESC
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, email, status, department FROM users
<trim prefix="WHERE" prefixOverrides="AND|OR" suffix="ORDER BY created_at DESC" suffixOverrides=",">
    <if test="status != null">
        <if test="dept != null">
            status = #{status} AND department = #{dept} AND
        </if>
        <if test="dept == null">
            status = #{status} AND
        </if>
    </if>
    <if test="name != null">
        name = #{name} AND
    </if>
    <if test="email != null">
        email = #{email},
    </if>
</trim>
